properties.name: Peneda-Gerês National Park (Viana do Castelo flank)
properties.description: Alternative pilot AOI centered on the July–August 2025 Peneda-Gerês fire — started 26 July 2025 inside the PNPG, the single largest event of the worst Portuguese fire season since 2017 (>200,000 ha nationally, 2.3% of national territory). Most severe district response of the season was Viana do Castelo with ~622 firefighters deployed.
properties.rationale: Most recent extreme-burn case at AOI-freeze time, protected-area context (PNPG / Rede Natura 2000), trans-district fire behaviour, contrasts the Centro pilot with a Norte-mountain regime (granite, shrub-dominated fuel, different fire-weather drivers).
properties.source: Alternative for PRE_DEV_CHECKLIST.md item D — see docs/aoi_rationale.md.
